# shell

## Plugin reference

- Description: App shell for Sonata. Registers the /sonata app entry and defines the Sonata.Section slot.
- Web:
  - Contributes: `Apps.App` "Sonata" → `SonataLayout`
  - Uses: `apps.Apps`
  - Exports: Values: `Sonata`
